title: Bitter Flaky Korean Crumble
description: This festive Korean dish features a blend of bitter flavors with smoked paprika and ferment for added depth, suitable as a low-calorie-friendly snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine oat flour, fermented black beans (if using), smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add water gradually while mixing until the mixture comes together to form a dough. It should be sticky but manageable.
Knead the dough for about 2 minutes to develop structure. Divide into small balls.
Preheat your oven to 180°C (350°F). Place each ball on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, slightly flattening them.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
